query: SELECT remoteJid, LENGTH(REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '')) as digits_len FROM messages WHERE sessionId IS NOT NULL AND remoteJid LIKE '%@s.whatsapp.net' AND LENGTH(REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '')) = 12 GROUP BY remoteJid LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT remoteJid, LENGTH(REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '')) as digits_len FROM messages WHERE sessionId IS NOT NULL AND remoteJid LIKE '%@s.whatsapp.net' AND LENGTH(REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '')) = 12 GROUP BY remoteJid LIMIT 10;
